title: Your AI Agent Needs a Tool
summary: AWS tutorial on enabling AI agents to use tools for real-time data and actions instead of relying solely on training data. Demonstrates tool architecture with schema and handlers, contrasts agents versus chatbots, and shows Python implementation using Strands Agents framework with MCP standard.
writeup: This AWS Developers tutorial covers how AI agents call tools to fetch real-time data and take actions rather than depending only on training data. It explains the tool architecture of schemas and handlers, distinguishes agents from chatbots, and walks through a Python implementation using the Strands Agents framework with the MCP standard. The framing also touches on system prompts and context window limitations, clarifying why tool calling addresses gaps that static training data and bounded context cannot.
